notes: Fire Optimus grid (MC Lancer Origin: spear+axe). Scythe of Renunciation T5 (pendulum-alpha + chain-temptation), Demolition-Tiger Axe (Celestial, weapon-atk awakening lv5), Ultima Axe ULB (gauph: Strength + beta + Tria), Worldstorming Aetos (weapon-skill awakening lv10), Fist of Destruction (grand weapon-skill awakening lv4), Dragon Bar V 3*, Sennen Goji x2, Crimson Scale x2. Summons: main Versusia 4*, friend Agni 5* lv200 (aura 150), subs Belial/Bahamut 250/Michael/The Sun/Lodern/God Rabbit Gigamax. Panel: EX Might Sp. 80 and DMG Cap 20 shown orange (capped). All keys/summon tiers USER-CONFIRMED; only the scythe variant was corrected from the original entry (Repudiation -> Renunciation, the omega opus). Notable decompositions: N.A. DMG Cap 15 = celestial 5 + alpha Pendulum 10; Skill DMG Cap 95 = gauph-beta 50 + Fist grand 25 + Aetos world 20; DA/TA 28.75 = Trium 3.5x2.5 + Conviction II 15/10 + alpha 240-upgrade 5 (+ celestial TA 5). Sub-summon auras do NOT appear on this panel (Belial supp absent; DMG Supp = exactly 2x Pact).
